## Description

Please include a summary of the changes, the rationale behind them, and link any related issues.

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of Change

Please select options that are relevant:

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update (installation, API, architecture docs)
- [ ] 🎨 Style / UI enhancement (formatting, layout updates, CSS tweaks)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance optimization (rendering, token utilization, caching)
- [ ] 🚀 CI/CD or workflow automation (GitHub actions, workflows)

## Visuals & Interactions

If this change modifies the user interface or layout, please include screenshots, recordings, or design specs here:

| Before | After |
| :--- | :--- |
| (Insert image) | (Insert image) |

## Quality & Verification

### Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the code style guidelines of this project (run `npm run lint`).
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand or critical logic.
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly if any APIs or guides changed.
- [ ] My changes generate no new ESLint warnings or build warnings.
- [ ] I have tested this manually on multiple viewports for responsiveness.

### Testing Environment

- **OS:** (e.g., Windows 11, macOS Sequoia, Ubuntu)
- **Node Version:** (e.g., v20.x, v18.x)
- **Browser:** (e.g., Chrome, Safari, Firefox)
